'''''Star Wars: Star Pilot''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] DK Readers Level 3 title that details different [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in the ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. It was written by [[Laura Buller]] and was published by [[Dorling Kindersley|DK Publishing]] on [[April 2]], [[2005]].

''Star Wars: Star Pilot'' holds the distinction of being the first ''Star Wars'' Legends source to explicitly provide a length of 19,000 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] for the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']].

The book was [[Star Wars: Star Pilot (2015)|reissued]] under the [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] brand in [[2015]] with new cover art and expanded content as part of the new ''Star Wars'' [[canon]]. The book's original Legends version was also reissued with new cover art as part of the ''[[Learn to Read with Star Wars: Darth Vader Level 3]]'' box set on [[December 12]], [[2017]].

{{Book-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''What is the biggest spaceship? What is a Jedi starfighter? This exciting book has all the answers!''

==Contents==
*Into the [[Star/Legends|stars]]
*[[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control Ship]]
*[[J-type 327 Nubian royal starship/Legends|Naboo Royal Starship]]
*[[Podracer/Legends|Podracers]]
*[[N-1 starfighter/Legends|Naboo Royal N-1 starfighters]]
*[[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']]
*[[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Republic gunships]]
*[[Jedi starfighter]]s
*[[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']]
*[[Escape pod/Legends|Escape pods]]
*[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Imperial shuttles]]
*[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]
*[[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]
*[[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]]
*[[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]]
*Glossary

==Continuity==
The book mislabels a picture of [[Grizz Frix/Legends|Grizz Frix's]] doomed starfighter for that of the [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-Wing]] piloted by [[Arvel Crynyd/Legends|Arvel Crynyd]].
